programme.title: Momentum: Beyond Earth: Private Ambitions in Space
programme.desc: Haslinda Amin reveals the burgeoning role of India's private space firms and their recent advances through interviews with leaders and innovators, learning how they are pushing the boundaries of space. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: In a remote village temple in India, a daring heist saw precious and ancient cultural heritage disappear two citizen detectives work to bring down one of the biggest art thieves in history. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: PFAS are used in thousands of products aimed at making life easier, but the chemicals are now almost everywhere and are being linked to severe health problems. (S2 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: In 2021, Agnes Tirop broke the women's 10,000 meter world record five weeks later, she was dead "Bloomberg Investigates" examines her murder and the threat of violence for other Kenyan runners. (S2 E02)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: A "shadow fleet" of aging tankers is keeping Russian oil flowing Bloomberg set out to uncover the network of intermediaries working to sell the Kremlin's oil while getting rich in the process. (S2 E03)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars are involved a US government agency works to prove suppliers to research labs import wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Months after the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, residents are still looking for answers while the work continues, divergent opinions from government agencies, independent experts and contractors are adding to the anxiety residents have. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: In Texas, a former preacher exploited the trust of his peers under a cloak of religious virtue this is the intimate story of those whose lives were destroyed by his $38 million dollar Ponzi scheme. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Green Bible is the single-most important document in the Italian government's war against an alleged Nigerian mafia but this supposed mafia handbook isn't what it claims to be at all. (S3 E02)

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Beti Hamari Anmol
programme.desc: In this hugely inspirational success story, Anmol, a small town girl, not only fights the societal obstacles faced by any small town girl in our country but also takes on the social stigma she has had to face for being so short heighted that she has been termed as a “dwarf”. Anmol, with her strong will power and belief in herself, fights the hate she has had to receive from her in-law's. Anmol becomes a doctor with the support of her husband, in the same hospital where her father works as a peon, to win back her dignity as well as bring a lot of pride to her and her in law's family.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The Story Highlights The Exploitation Happening With The ‘Bunkars' In Banaras, Whose Craft Is Appreciated All Around The World, But They Are Paid Peanuts By The Traders. Amidst This, Blooms A Love Story Between The Two Opposites – Gauri, A Bunkar And Garv, A Trader. The Story Is Of Gauri Who Belongs To The Bunkar Community Facing A Series Of Incidents That Destroy Her Family And Swears To Bring About A Change In Their Life And Stop The Exploitation By Directly Trading The Sarees. This Becomes A Battle With Traders Creating Hurdles In Her Life But She Is Unstoppable.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In The Divine Saga Inspired By Bhakt Prahlad, Witness The Journey Of Mahima, A Devout Disciple Of Maata, As She Challenges The Tyranny Of Indrayani, Whose Sins Overflow In A Reign Of Oppression. Sent Into The Heart Of Indrayani'S Lineage, Mahima Embodies The Triumph Of Faith Over Darkness, Destined To End The Era Of Tyranny And Usher In An Era Of Righteousness.

programme.title: Maa Shakti
programme.desc: Maa Shakti who is known as the divine force in Hinduism. She is considered the source of power and creation and can transform herself into various forms

programme.title: Faraar Kab Tak
programme.desc: The Horrifying Fact That Millions Of Unidentified Criminals Are Absconding Across The Nation, Is Enough To Frighten Anyone! The Show Is A Clutter Breaking Factual Crime Drama Series That Appeals To The Inherent Security Concern Of A Family. Engaging Police Procedure On True Crime Cases Is Brought To Life With An Edge Of Seat Narrative.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle's nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety.

programme.title: A Gem of a Deal
programme.desc: When a con artist purchases Nicky's granny's house for a fake gemstone necklace, the SECRET LAB KIDS must learn about minerals in order to save granny from ruin.

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Backyard Ballistics

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We explore the environmental consequences of war and how different people, from Rohingya refugees to Syrian scientists, are trying to restore a healthy relationship with nature.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We explore potential new strategies to satisfy the growing food demand, from restaurants growing potatoes in the air to jellyfish as a potential sustainable meat alternative.

programme.desc: We meet grassroots movements in US and UK who are fighting for a political intervention to stop climate change.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: For this episode we will travel to the Entabeni Safari Conservancy where a special family of African elephant awaits relocation. The family will be moved from a private conservation area as they have reached the carrying capacity of that area.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: With a high reproduction rate that leads to large numbers on reserves and are the staple diet for predators that keep their numbers in check. See how these highly adapted and unique animals get loaded and gently treated to “migrate” to a new home.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. There's a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm – the human animal included. To give an obvious example, there's our internal body clock which responds to the so-called Circadian rhythm.

programme.title: Ten Things To Do Around The World
Lock Stock And Two Smoking Tikkas
Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara. First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Fantast Castle & Bechej town, Serbia
programme.desc: Beautiful Serbia: it is a multicultural country with a lot of fascinating places to discover. Though it is a small state, it still has one of the most significant Slavic cultural heritages in the world. Today we will travel to the pearl of Serbian lands: "&"Fantast castle and the nearby city of Becej.

programme.title: Antalya city, Turkey
programme.desc: When King Attalos first set eyes on Antalya he called it “Paradise on Earth”. Its fertile soil and natural harbour made it favourable for settlers throughout the ages. Therefore Antalya has a rich cultural heritage with many remains of an outstanding history. The Persians, Alexander the Great, the Romans, the Arabs and many more have left their mark on the area over the centuries but no one more than King Attalos of Pergamon who in 159 B.C. gave the region its name Attaleia, which leaded to the modern name Antalya....

programme.title: Mariupol town, Ukraine
programme.desc: Mariupol is a city of regional significance in south eastern Ukraine, situated on the north coast of the Sea of Azov at the mouth of the Kalmius river, in the Pryazovia region.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Ein Kerem, the Christian Revelation, Israel
programme.desc: Ein Kerem, the place of the birth of Saint John the Baptist, as well as the visitation of Mary, but also a chic and pastoral touristic place…

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Bernardine Church and Monastery, Ukraine
programme.desc: In one of the most beautiful and hospitable cities of Ukraine sits the Bernardine monastery, a defensive outpost of Lviv and the Church of Saint Andrew, both monuments of Renaissance architecture.
